title: unhide seedream and seedream-pro
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Removes `hidden: true` from `seedream` (v4.0) and `seedream-pro` (v4.5 Pro) in `shared/registry/image.ts`.

Both legacy models are still actively used by paying customers — `seedream-pro` did 1,186 successful calls in the past 7 days and `seedream` did 223, but neither appears in `/image/models` or the dashboard, so discovery is broken. Pricing/cost unchanged (50% margin on both). `paidOnly: true` stays.

`seedream5` (v5.0 Lite) remains the recommended current model; this just makes the legacy SKUs visible to users who want the older photoreal look.

gist.headline: Classic dreams
gist.blurb: We've unhidden the legacy Seedream v4.0 and v4.5 Pro models in the API and dashboard. If you prefer that classic photoreal look, they're back on the menu.
gist.summary: The legacy `seedream` (v4.0) and `seedream-pro` (v4.5 Pro) image models are now visible in the `/image/models` endpoint and dashboard.
gist.impact: Users who prefer the older photoreal aesthetic can now easily discover and select these models, which remain available for paid tiers.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot uncovering two glowing, classic seeds (representing the legacy seedream models) in a cozy garden shed.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot in a warm garden shed, wiping dust off two glowing, classic seeds on a wooden workbench. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
